title: TODOs
summary: Work-tracking list for deferred items with Shipped and Declined sections; currently no active TODOs.
notes: Primarily a work-tracking ledger (DOC). The Declined section contains a decision-with-rationale about not pinning the OpenClaw Gateway image by digest, which has ADR-like qualities, but it is embedded in a TODO list rather than formatted as a standalone ADR (no Status/Context/Decision/Consequences structure, no ADR filename convention). Classified DOC with the decision preserved in scope for the synthesizer.
